description_long: This is a freestanding, rectangular oven with a four-burner stovetop and a front-facing oven compartment. The oven door is hinged at the bottom and opens downward, revealing a spacious interior with a single rack. The exterior is primarily a matte gray color, with subtle paneling details on the sides and front. The stovetop features four distinct burners arranged in a square pattern, each with a visible grate. The control panel is located above the oven door, with a row of square or rectangular controls. The oven lacks any visible brand markings, window on the door, or prominent ventilation features.
description: A matte gray freestanding oven with a four-burner stovetop, front-opening door, and a simple control panel above the oven compartment.
description_view_0: Side view showing the oven door partially open and the side panel's rectangular design.
description_view_1: Front view with the oven door fully open, revealing the interior and the control panel above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the oven door partially open, mirroring the design of the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned back panel with no visible features.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is a horizontal strip above the oven door, featuring a row of square or rectangular controls, likely knobs or buttons, evenly spaced. There are no visible digital displays, touchscreens, or detailed labeling. The design is minimalistic and functional.
attribute_door_handle_type: The oven door handle is integrated into the top edge of the door, forming a horizontal recessed grip. It appears to be made of the same material as the door, with no protruding or decorative elements.
